requirement_topic.en: ARE / SBEE / CEB Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), 50 Hz / 220/380 V Settings, and WAPP Interconnection Context
requirement_topic.zh: ARE / SBEE / CEB并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、50 Hz / 220/380 V参数及WAPP互联背景
requirement_topic.zht: ARE / SBEE / CEB併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、50 Hz / 220/380 V參數及WAPP互聯背景

summary.en: Benin's electricity sector is regulated by ARE (Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité). The national utility SBEE (Société Béninoise d'Energie Electrique) handles distribution; CEB (Communauté Électrique du Bénin, shared with Togo) operates high-voltage transmission and cross-border interconnections within the West African Power Pool (WAPP). For grid-connected solar PV inverters, Benin applies the regional IEC-based framework: anti-islanding per IEC 62116, grid parameters at 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase (same nominal voltage as China's GB/T 156), and reconnection delay requirements aligned with IEC 61727. ARE licensing is required before a grid-connected installation may operate; SBEE/CEB connection approval and a net-metering or power-purchase arrangement must be secured. In World Bank- and MCC-financed projects (e.g. MCC Compact solar components, Defissol rural electrification), IEC compliance documentation and donor-specified equipment lists are additional gates beyond ARE/SBEE baseline requirements.
summary.zh: 贝宁电力行业由ARE（电力监管局）负责监管。国家电力公司SBEE（贝宁电能公司）负责配电；CEB（贝宁-多哥电力共同体）在西非电力联营（WAPP）框架内运营高压输电和跨境互联。对于并网太阳能光伏逆变器，贝宁采用基于IEC的区域框架：依据IEC 62116的防孤岛保护、50 Hz电网频率、220 V单相/380 V三相电压（与中国GB/T 156标称电压相同），以及符合IEC 61727的重合闸延迟要求。并网装置运营前须取得ARE许可；须获得SBEE/CEB的并网审批及净计量或购电协议。在世界银行和千年挑战公司（MCC）资助项目（如MCC Compact太阳能组件、Defissol农村电气化）中，IEC合规文件和捐助方指定设备清单是ARE/SBEE基本要求之外的额外门槛。
summary.zht: 貝寧電力行業由ARE（電力監管局）負責監管。國家電力公司SBEE（貝寧電能公司）負責配電；CEB（貝寧-多哥電力共同體）在西非電力聯營（WAPP）框架內運營高壓輸電和跨境互聯。對於併網太陽能光伏逆變器，貝寧採用基於IEC的區域框架：依據IEC 62116的防孤島保護、50 Hz電網頻率、220 V單相/380 V三相電壓（與中國GB/T 156標稱電壓相同），以及符合IEC 61727的重合閘延遲要求。併網裝置運營前須取得ARE許可；須獲得SBEE/CEB的併網審批及淨計量或購電協議。在世界銀行和千年挑戰公司（MCC）資助項目（如MCC Compact太陽能組件、Defissol農村電氣化）中，IEC合規文件和捐助方指定設備清單是ARE/SBEE基本要求之外的額外門檻。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (adopted as reference standard in Francophone West Africa IEC-aligned framework)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (grid-connection technical requirements applicable in Benin)
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (safety basis for grid-tied PV inverters in Benin)
ARE (Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité du Bénin) — Licensing and grid-connection authorisation requirements
SBEE / CEB — Distribution and transmission connection approval requirements
WAPP (West African Power Pool) — Regional grid code context for transmission-level interconnection

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly presented includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004-2018 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and domestic anti-islanding test results under the Chinese grid framework. Notably, China's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz under GB/T 156) is the same nominal level as Benin's grid — eliminating the voltage-mismatch gap that exists for Qatar (240/415 V). However, Chinese GB/T anti-islanding and grid-connection documents are based on Chinese grid codes and SGCC/CSG operator rules; they are not formally recognised by ARE or SBEE as pre-approved equivalents. Benin's ARE and SBEE require inverters to demonstrate IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance and IEC 61727 interface characteristics as the technical basis for grid-connection approval.
summary.zh: 中国通常提交的并网证据包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）及中国电网框架下的国内防孤岛测试结果。值得注意的是，中国标称电网电压（依据GB/T 156为220/380 V、50 Hz）与贝宁电网标称电压相同，消除了卡塔尔（240/415 V）存在的电压不匹配差距。然而，中国GB/T防孤岛和并网文件基于中国电网规程及国家电网/南方电网规则，ARE或SBEE并不正式认可其为预先批准的等效依据。贝宁ARE和SBEE要求逆变器证明符合IEC 62116防孤岛标准和IEC 61727电网接口特性，作为并网审批的技术依据。
summary.zht: 中國通常提交的併網證據包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏併網逆變器技術規範）及中國電網框架下的國內防孤島測試結果。值得注意的是，中國標稱電網電壓（依據GB/T 156為220/380 V、50 Hz）與貝寧電網標稱電壓相同，消除了卡達（240/415 V）存在的電壓不匹配差距。然而，中國GB/T防孤島和併網文件基於中國電網規程及國家電網/南方電網規則，ARE或SBEE並不正式認可其為預先批准的等效依據。貝寧ARE和SBEE要求逆變器證明符合IEC 62116防孤島標準和IEC 61727電網接口特性，作為併網審批的技術依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — 220/380 V, 50 Hz (same nominal level as Benin)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China and Benin share the same 220/380 V, 50 Hz nominal voltage, which is a practical advantage — inverter firmware protection thresholds validated for China's grid are broadly compatible with Benin's grid parameters, and no voltage-related re-parameterisation is required. However, Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents are not accepted by ARE or SBEE as substitutes for IEC-based evidence. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 grid interface compliance evidence; (c) ARE licensing documentation confirming the installer and project are authorised; (d) SBEE/CEB connection application and approval. For donor-funded projects (World Bank, MCC, AFD), additional inverter specification compliance may be required against donor equipment eligibility lists. West Africa environmental conditions (high ambient temperature 35–45°C, dust, humidity) require derating assessment — verify the inverter's rated operating envelope against the site's climate data.
gap.zh: 差距：中国和贝宁共用220/380 V、50 Hz标称电压，这在实践中是一个优势——针对中国电网验证的逆变器固件保护阈值与贝宁电网参数大体兼容，无需电压相关的重新参数化。然而，中国GB/T并网文件不被ARE或SBEE接受为IEC证据的替代。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727电网接口合规证据；（c）ARE许可文件，确认安装商和项目已获授权；（d）SBEE/CEB并网申请和审批。对于捐助方资助项目（世界银行、MCC、法国开发署），可能需要符合捐助方设备资格清单的额外逆变器规格合规证明。西非环境条件（高环境温度35–45°C、粉尘、湿度）需要进行降额评估——须将逆变器额定运行范围与现场气候数据核对。
gap.zht: 差距：中國和貝寧共用220/380 V、50 Hz標稱電壓，這在實踐中是一個優勢——針對中國電網驗證的逆變器韌體保護閾值與貝寧電網參數大體相容，無需電壓相關的重新參數化。然而，中國GB/T併網文件不被ARE或SBEE接受為IEC證據的替代。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727電網接口合規證據；（c）ARE許可文件，確認安裝商和項目已獲授權；（d）SBEE/CEB併網申請和審批。對於捐助方資助項目（世界銀行、MCC、法國開發署），可能需要符合捐助方設備資格清單的額外逆變器規格合規證明。西非環境條件（高環境溫度35–45°C、粉塵、濕度）需要進行降額評估——須將逆變器額定運行範圍與現場氣候數據核對。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARE licensing and SBEE/CEB grid-connection approval are required before any grid-connected PV installation may operate commercially in Benin; IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence is the technical foundation for grid-connection acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements (SGCC/CSG) but is not formally accepted by ARE or SBEE as pre-approved equivalent documentation

source.publisher: ARE — Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité du Bénin

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Benin's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid means Chinese inverter firmware settings are broadly voltage-compatible — but ARE licensing, SBEE/CEB connection approval, and IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence are still mandatory gates that Chinese GB/T documents cannot satisfy alone. Obtain IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, secure ARE project authorisation, and apply for SBEE/CEB connection approval before commissioning. For donor-funded projects, confirm inverter eligibility against the donor's equipment list. Verify current ARE regulations and SBEE connection procedures directly with ARE and SBEE before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 贝宁220/380 V、50 Hz电网意味着中国逆变器固件设置在电压上大体兼容——但ARE许可、SBEE/CEB并网审批及IEC 62116防孤岛证据仍是中国GB/T文件单独无法满足的强制性门槛。须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62116和IEC 61727测试报告，取得ARE项目授权，并在调试前申请SBEE/CEB并网审批。对于捐助方资助项目，请对照捐助方设备清单确认逆变器资格。在提交项目前，请直接向ARE和SBEE核实现行ARE法规及SBEE并网程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 貝寧220/380 V、50 Hz電網意味著中國逆變器韌體設置在電壓上大體相容——但ARE許可、SBEE/CEB併網審批及IEC 62116防孤島證據仍是中國GB/T文件單獨無法滿足的強制性門檻。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62116和IEC 61727測試報告，取得ARE項目授權，並在調試前申請SBEE/CEB併網審批。對於捐助方資助項目，請對照捐助方設備清單確認逆變器資格。在提交項目前，請直接向ARE和SBEE核實現行ARE法規及SBEE併網程序。

requirement_topic.en: ARE Distributed / Off-Grid Solar Licensing and Rural Electrification Context — SBEE Net-Metering and Donor-Funded Project Equipment Gates
requirement_topic.zh: ARE分布式/离网太阳能许可及农村电气化背景——SBEE净计量及捐助方资助项目设备门槛
requirement_topic.zht: ARE分散式/離網太陽能許可及農村電氣化背景——SBEE淨計量及捐助方資助項目設備門檻

summary.en: Benin has an active rural electrification and distributed solar programme. Key structures include: (1) ARE electricity operator licensing — solar project developers and distributors must hold an ARE licence (concession, authorisation, or declaration depending on project scale); (2) SBEE net-metering — residential and commercial grid-tied solar installations must apply through SBEE for a net-metering arrangement; SBEE installs a bidirectional meter; (3) Donor-funded project gates — MCC Compact (Millennium Challenge Corporation, US) solar components and World Bank / AFD (Agence Française de Développement) rural electrification projects impose additional equipment eligibility requirements, often including IEC type-test certification evidence and DEEC (Direction de l'Energie et de l'Eau Continentale, now restructured under MEEP) approval. Chinese-supplied inverters must satisfy all applicable gates: ARE licence, SBEE connection, and any donor equipment specification, before being deployed.
summary.zh: 贝宁拥有活跃的农村电气化和分布式太阳能计划。主要架构包括：（1）ARE电力运营商许可——太阳能项目开发商和分销商须持有ARE许可证（根据项目规模分为特许经营、授权或申报）；（2）SBEE净计量——住宅和商业并网太阳能装置须通过SBEE申请净计量安排；SBEE安装双向电表；（3）捐助方资助项目门槛——MCC Compact（美国千年挑战公司）太阳能组件及世界银行/法国开发署（AFD）农村电气化项目设置额外的设备资格要求，通常包括IEC型式试验认证证据和DEEC（大陆能源与水资源局，现已在MEEP框架下重组）审批。中国供应的逆变器在部署前须满足所有适用门槛：ARE许可、SBEE并网及任何捐助方设备规格要求。
summary.zht: 貝寧擁有活躍的農村電氣化和分散式太陽能計畫。主要架構包括：（1）ARE電力運營商許可——太陽能項目開發商和分銷商須持有ARE許可證（根據項目規模分為特許經營、授權或申報）；（2）SBEE淨計量——住宅和商業併網太陽能裝置須通過SBEE申請淨計量安排；SBEE安裝雙向電表；（3）捐助方資助項目門檻——MCC Compact（美國千年挑戰公司）太陽能組件及世界銀行/法國開發署（AFD）農村電氣化項目設置額外的設備資格要求，通常包括IEC型式試驗認證證據和DEEC（大陸能源與水資源局，現已在MEEP框架下重組）審批。中國供應的逆變器在部署前須滿足所有適用門檻：ARE許可、SBEE併網及任何捐助方設備規格要求。

standards_or_laws: ARE (Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité du Bénin) — Electricity operator licensing framework (Law No. 2006-08 electricity sector law and subsequent decrees)
SBEE — Net-metering programme and bidirectional meter installation requirements
MCC Compact (Benin II, 2022) — Equipment eligibility and procurement requirements for MCC-financed solar components
IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, IEC 61727 — IEC standards commonly referenced in donor-funded project equipment specifications

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to Benin's ARE licensing or SBEE net-metering framework. China's distributed solar connection is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) distributed PV policies and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) connection rules, which reference domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964-2024). These Chinese frameworks are not recognised by ARE, SBEE, or international donor agencies (World Bank, MCC, AFD) as equivalent to IEC-based compliance documentation. Donor-funded project equipment requirements typically specify IEC type-test evidence, which Chinese domestic certificates (CQC/CGC based solely on GB/T standards) do not satisfy.
summary.zh: 中国没有与贝宁ARE许可或SBEE净计量框架直接对应的机制。中国分布式太阳能并网受国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策及电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）并网规则管理，引用国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。上述中国框架不被ARE、SBEE或国际捐助机构（世界银行、MCC、法国开发署）认可为IEC合规文件的等效依据。捐助方资助项目设备要求通常规定IEC型式试验证据，仅基于GB/T标准的中国国内证书（CQC/CGC）不能满足。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與貝寧ARE許可或SBEE淨計量框架直接對應的機制。中國分散式太陽能併網受國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策及電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）併網規則管理，引用國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。上述中國框架不被ARE、SBEE或國際捐助機構（世界銀行、MCC、法國開發署）認可為IEC合規文件的等效依據。捐助方資助項目設備要求通常規定IEC型式試驗證據，僅基於GB/T標準的中國國內證書（CQC/CGC）不能滿足。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese distributed solar approvals do not transfer to Benin's ARE licensing or SBEE net-metering framework. For any grid-connected solar project in Benin, the compliance path requires: (a) ARE operator licence for the project developer/installer; (b) SBEE connection application and net-metering agreement; (c) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 interface evidence for the inverter; (d) for donor-funded projects, compliance with the specific donor equipment eligibility list — which commonly requires IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence and IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Chinese CQC/CGC certificates based solely on GB/T standards are typically not accepted by donor procurement rules.
gap.zh: 差距：中国分布式太阳能审批不能转移至贝宁ARE许可或SBEE净计量框架。贝宁任何并网太阳能项目的合规路径须包括：（a）项目开发商/安装商的ARE运营商许可证；（b）SBEE并网申请和净计量协议；（c）逆变器的IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727接口证据；（d）对于捐助方资助项目，须符合特定捐助方设备资格清单——通常要求来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据和IEC 62116防孤岛证据。仅基于GB/T标准的中国CQC/CGC证书通常不被捐助方采购规则接受。
gap.zht: 差距：中國分散式太陽能審批不能轉移至貝寧ARE許可或SBEE淨計量框架。貝寧任何併網太陽能項目的合規路徑須包括：（a）項目開發商/安裝商的ARE運營商許可證；（b）SBEE併網申請和淨計量協議；（c）逆變器的IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727接口證據；（d）對於捐助方資助項目，須符合特定捐助方設備資格清單——通常要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據和IEC 62116防孤島證據。僅基於GB/T標準的中國CQC/CGC證書通常不被捐助方採購規則接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARE licensing and SBEE connection approval are legal requirements for grid-connected solar operation in Benin; donor project equipment gates are contractually mandatory for MCC/World Bank/AFD-financed projects
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar approvals are granted under China NEA policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Benin

source.publisher: ARE — Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité du Bénin

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ARE licensing and SBEE net-metering approval are independent project gates from any Chinese domestic solar approval. Confirm inverter IEC compliance evidence (IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, IEC 61727) and operator ARE licence status before project submission. For MCC, World Bank, or AFD-funded projects, verify the specific equipment eligibility list required by the donor procurement rules — Chinese GB/T-only certificates are typically not accepted. Verify current ARE licensing categories, SBEE connection procedures, and any updated donor equipment requirements directly with the relevant agencies before committing product to a Benin solar project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ARE许可和SBEE净计量审批是独立于任何中国国内太阳能审批的项目门槛。在提交项目前，确认逆变器IEC合规证据（IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727）及ARE运营商许可状态。对于MCC、世界银行或法国开发署资助项目，核实捐助方采购规则要求的具体设备资格清单——仅持有GB/T证书通常不被接受。在将产品投入贝宁太阳能项目前，请直接向相关机构核实现行ARE许可类别、SBEE并网程序及任何更新的捐助方设备要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ARE許可和SBEE淨計量審批是獨立於任何中國國內太陽能審批的項目門檻。在提交項目前，確認逆變器IEC合規證據（IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727）及ARE運營商許可狀態。對於MCC、世界銀行或法國開發署資助項目，核實捐助方採購規則要求的具體設備資格清單——僅持有GB/T證書通常不被接受。在將產品投入貝寧太陽能項目前，請直接向相關機構核實現行ARE許可類別、SBEE併網程序及任何更新的捐助方設備要求。
